purpose: Fail closed unless an exported ZIP, sidecar, ledger, DAG, pointer, manifest, provenance, receipt, and validator decision all agree that the bundle is recovery-proven.

algorithm: open export ZIP listing
load STAGE_STATE_LEDGER_v1.json from active root and from ZIP when available
select expected ledger entry
for each ledger-declared output, assert ZIP contains Metablooms_OS_refined/<output>
allow exception only if output is declared in explicit_external_outputs with external_sidecar_required=true
gate_definitions.decision: blocking FAIL if any required output is missing

algorithm: for expected stage receipt and final receipts inside ZIP
load JSON and assert status=complete or locked
assert verdict=PASS
assert no next command like VERIFY EXPORT remains
gate_definitions.decision: blocking FAIL for PENDING_EXPORT, export_ready, blocked, or missing verdict

algorithm: scan EXPORT_MANIFEST_v1.json, EXPORT_PROVENANCE_v1.json, sidecar, receipts, baseline locks
reject values containing <filled_after_zip>, TODO, FIXME, pending, PENDING_EXPORT
reject size_bytes=0 for exported ZIP subject
gate_definitions.decision: blocking FAIL for placeholder or zero-size final metadata

algorithm: collect heads from pointer, ledger, receipt, manifest, provenance, baseline lock
if equal, pass
if not equal, require lifecycle labels: pre_export_head, exported_tree_head, metadata_commit_head, final_lock_head, current_working_head
assert each label has documented relationship
assert sidecar file exists
compute ZIP sha256 and size
assert sidecar sha256/size matches
load internal manifest and assert external_sidecar_required policy or sidecar reference exists
gate_definitions.decision: blocking FAIL if sidecar is absent, mismatched, or unbound

algorithm: assert no duplicate ZIP entries
assert ZIP entry list sorted or manifest records order policy
assert no __pycache__, .pytest_cache, nested .git, or unmanifested evidence gitlinks
assert excluded paths policy is present
load STAGE_DAG_v1.json and STAGE_STATE_LEDGER_v1.json
resolve expected_dag_node_id to expected_ledger_entry_id using explicit mapping or entry metadata
do not infer short ID equivalence without mapping
gate_definitions.decision: blocking FAIL if mapping is ambiguous

algorithm: scan artifact_registry for pointer-like boot-critical artifacts
assert exactly one active boot-critical pointer per pointer role
allow quarantined/conflict_resolved status
gate_definitions.decision: blocking FAIL if conflicting active pointers remain

algorithm: assert pointer and ledger latest_pass reference committed validated state
assert FAIL/BLOCK/repair entries do not advance latest_pass unless explicitly governed
assert validator decision was produced before PASS claim
assert validator decision artifact exists
assert every required gate has a gate_result
assert blocking_failed_count=0 and verdict=PASS

non_goals: G1 does not implement validator code.
G1 does not create regression fixtures.
G1 does not export a new bundle.
G1 does not run boot recovery proof.
